title: AppSec Finding - Hardcoded Secret in Configuration
text: A static review found an API token committed directly into a configuration file in the repository history. While the token was for a non-production service, committing secrets to version control risks exposure to anyone with read access and persists in history after deletion. Remediation: rotate the exposed token, move secrets to an environment-injected secret manager, add a pre-commit secret scanner, and document the rotation. Severity assessed as medium pending confirmation the token is non-production.
